tldr_zh: SpaceX成功上市掀AI科技IPO熱潮，馬斯克成全球首位兆元富豪；美伊和平協議近完成，OpenAI推新課程與安全AI應用。
tldr_en: SpaceX IPO launches AI tech IPO boom with Musk becoming world's first trillionaire; US-Iran peace deal nears completion; OpenAI launches new courses and safe AI applications.

items.title_zh: SpaceX成功掛牌上市 馬斯克成全球首位兆元富豪
items.title_en: SpaceX IPO Soars 19%, Makes Elon Musk World's First Trillionaire
items.summary_zh: SpaceX在紐約那斯達克交易所成功上市，首日股價上漲19%以上，公司市值達2.2兆美元，成為全球第6大企業。馬斯克身家突破1兆美元，成為人類歷史上首位資產超過1兆美元的富豪，超越全球許多國家的GDP。
items.summary_en: SpaceX successfully listed on Nasdaq with first-day gains exceeding 19%, achieving a market valuation of $2.2 trillion and ranking as the world's 6th largest company. Founder Elon Musk's net worth surpassed $1 trillion, making him the world's first trillionaire, exceeding the GDP of many nations.
items.source: BBC / The Verge / TechCrunch / 中央社

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出學院課程 助用戶掌握AI實戰技能
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches Academy Courses for Practical AI Skills
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出三門新的學院課程，幫助用戶建立實用的AI技能、創建可重複的工作流程，並在日常工作中應用AI代理。課程內容涵蓋從基礎到進階的AI應用，為企業和個人提供系統化的學習路徑。
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduces three new Academy courses to help users build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply AI agents in everyday work. The curriculum provides structured learning paths for both enterprises and individuals from foundational to advanced applications.

items.title_zh: Mistral融資30億歐元 估值達200億歐元
items.title_en: Mistral Raises €3 Billion at €20 Billion Valuation
items.summary_zh: 歐洲AI新創Mistral據傳融資30億歐元，估值達200億歐元，較Series C輪的117億歐元估值翻倍成長。這反映出歐洲AI企業融資熱潮，與美國OpenAI、Anthropic等巨頭形成競爭態勢。
items.summary_en: European AI startup Mistral is reported to raise €3 billion at a €20 billion valuation, nearly doubling its previous Series C valuation of €11.7 billion. This reflects the heating funding landscape for European AI companies competing with US giants.

items.title_zh: 美伊和平協議近完成 美方：數日內簽署機率達80%
items.title_en: US-Iran Peace Deal Nearly Complete, Officials Say 80% Likelihood of Signing Soon
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦總理和美國官員表示，美國與伊朗和平協議的最終文本已獲各方同意，美方官員稱有80至85%機率在數日內簽署協議。該協議將重啟霍爾木茲海峽航運，結束長期軍事衝突。
items.summary_en: Pakistani Prime Minister and US officials state that the final text of the US-Iran peace deal has been agreed upon, with US officials saying there's an 80-85% likelihood of signing within days. The agreement would reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end prolonged military conflict.
items.source: BBC World / AP News / 中央社

items.title_zh: Oracle PeopleSoft零時差漏洞遭大規模攻擊
items.title_en: Critical Oracle PeopleSoft Zero-Day Exploited in Large-Scale Attacks
items.summary_zh: Oracle旗下企業軟體PeopleSoft爆發重大零時差漏洞，影響數百個組織。中國駭客組織已利用此漏洞竊取大量數據，該漏洞允許未經驗證的攻擊者遠程存取系統，風險等級極高。
items.summary_en: A critical zero-day vulnerability in Oracle's PeopleSoft software is being exploited in large-scale attacks affecting hundreds of organizations. Chinese threat actors are using the flaw to steal gigabytes of data, allowing unauthenticated remote access with severe risk levels.

items.title_zh: FFmpeg發現21個零時差漏洞 安全隱患重大
items.title_en: Twenty-One Zero-Days Discovered in FFmpeg Multimedia Library
items.summary_zh: 開源多媒體框架FFmpeg被發現存在21個零時差漏洞，攻擊者可利用這些漏洞執行任意程式碼。由於FFmpeg廣泛用於視訊處理和串流應用，此發現對全球許多服務構成重大安全威脅。
items.summary_en: Open-source multimedia framework FFmpeg is found to contain 21 zero-day vulnerabilities allowing arbitrary code execution. Given FFmpeg's widespread use in video processing and streaming applications, this discovery poses significant security risks globally.

items.title_zh: 蘋果Siri大幅升級 AI助手終於好用了
items.title_en: Apple's Siri Gets Major Upgrade, Finally Becomes Genuinely Useful
items.summary_zh: 蘋果推出全新版本的Siri，使用先進AI技術大幅提升其功能性和使用體驗。經過十多年的改進，Siri終於從飽受詬病的語音助手進化為實用工具，能更準確理解複雜命令。
items.summary_en: Apple rolls out significantly upgraded Siri powered by advanced AI technology, dramatically improving functionality and user experience. After over a decade of refinement, Siri has finally evolved from a much-maligned voice assistant into a genuinely useful tool for complex commands.

items.title_zh: 美國CISA規定高風險漏洞3天內須修補
items.title_en: US CISA Mandates 3-Day Patch Timeline for Critical Vulnerabilities
items.summary_zh: 美國網路安全暨基礎設施安全局(CISA)推出新規定，要求最高風險漏洞必須在3天內完成修補。此舉反映全球漏洞治理趨勢加強，與印度CERT-In的嚴格時間要求相呼應。
items.summary_en: US Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) introduces new mandate requiring the highest-risk vulnerabilities to be patched within 3 days. This reflects global trend toward stricter vulnerability management in line with India's CERT-In requirements.

items.title_zh: Meta新AI部門陷困境 6500名工程師面臨管理危機
items.title_en: Meta's New AI Unit Faces Internal Crisis, Engineers Report Poor Conditions
items.summary_zh: 報導指出Meta數月前成立的新AI部門面臨內部問題，6500名工程師聲稱工作環境嚴苛，團隊瀕臨分裂。該部門雖獲得巨額投資但管理層面臨重大挑戰，可能影響Meta的AI競爭力。
items.summary_en: Reports indicate Meta's newly established AI unit faces internal turmoil, with 6,500 engineers reporting harsh working conditions and potential team dissolution. Despite massive investment, management challenges could impact Meta's AI competitiveness.

items.title_zh: 中國駭客利用AI進行大規模詐騙 谷歌提起訴訟
items.title_en: Google Sues Chinese Cybercriminals Using AI for Large-Scale Scams
items.summary_zh: 谷歌對名為「Outsider Enterprise」的中國駭客組織提起訴訟，該組織利用AI技術對數十萬受害者進行詐騙，在兩週內發送250萬條簡訊。此案例凸顯AI被不當利用進行犯罪的風險。
items.summary_en: Google files lawsuit against Chinese cybercriminal group "Outsider Enterprise" for using AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over two weeks. The case highlights risks of AI misuse for criminal activities.

items.title_zh: FISA第702條款今晚失效 監視權力將持續至2027年
items.title_en: FISA Section 702 Expires Tonight But Surveillance Powers Continue Until March 2027
items.summary_zh: 美國FISA法第702條款將在今晚失效，但認證有效期延長至2027年3月。這意味著政府監視權力將持續運作，引發隱私倡導者的持續關注。
items.summary_en: FISA Section 702 expires tonight, but government surveillance certification remains valid until March 2027. This means surveillance powers will continue operating, raising continued privacy advocacy concerns.

items.title_zh: 烏克蘭成功測試完全自主無人機 殺傷俄軍
items.title_en: Ukraine Successfully Tests Fully Autonomous Drones in Combat Against Russian Forces
items.summary_zh: 烏克蘭進行一次重要測試，使用搭載AI模組的完全自主無人機對俄軍進行攻擊。這標誌著自主武器系統在實戰中的首次應用，引發國際對AI武器倫理的關注。
items.summary_en: Ukraine successfully tests fully autonomous AI-powered drones in combat operations against Russian forces. This marks the first documented use of fully autonomous weapons systems in actual warfare, raising international concerns about AI weapons ethics.
